response.justification: Sarah has strong technical depth, extensive experience with developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators), and clear leadership in open-source and workshop initiatives, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven technical leadership through open-source projects and workshops
Broad stack expertise across mobile, web, and embedded systems including iOS and DLang
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience
Lacks demonstrated experience in mobile platform ecosystem optimization
No mention of roadmap planning, organizational change, or cross-team alignment initiatives
